	##This repo is intended to demonstrate the capabilities of AI agents in orchestrating complex tasks.

	##*

	##*Copilot Instructions*##
	
	# Please write C# 14 code that is compatible with .NET 10.0.
	-- DO NOT remove comments or xml comments in the code.
	-- DO NOT alter pinned packages or dependencies.
	-- DO NOT use deprecated or obsolete APIs.
	-- Verify that the code follows best practices for performance, security, and maintainability.
	-- Ensure the code is well-structured and modular and follows SOLID principles.
	-- Keep your code changes focused on the specific task or feature being implemented.
	-- Make recommendations for improvements or optimizations when discovered.
	-- You are allowed to offer multiple alternative implementations to improve code quality.
	-- When providing code snippets, ensure they are complete and can be integrated seamlessly.
	-- You are allowed to refactor existing code to improve readability and maintainability.
	-- When refactoring, ensure that existing functionality is preserved and thoroughly tested.
	-- Avoid making assumptions about the broader context beyond the provided code.
